_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: Mutant Nf1 P1 adult flies exhibited increased CO 2 production and O 2 consumption across the 24-h photoperiod relative to controls... the respiratory quotient (RQ), the ratio of CO 2 eliminated to O 2 consumed, was significantly reduced
details: Increased CO2 production and O2 consumption across 24-h photoperiod with significantly reduced respiratory quotient (p < 0.001)
